audio_identity.overall_style: Action platformer soundtrack with rock/electric guitar foundation
distinctive_elements: Guitar lead with backing harmony support
Drum and percussion layering (drums, toms, hi-hats)
Vibrato and panning effects on instruments

sources_used: tcrf - Uncompiled source code (GAK00 assembly patterns)
notes: Source code analysis reveals 8 simultaneous audio channels: Guitar, Backing, Bass, Drums, Toms, Hi-hats, Organ A, Organ B. Composition uses F#minor key signature. Sound Test feature available in Japanese and European versions only. Data extracted from uncompiled assembly code at ROM offset 0xF8000; specific tempo/meter values not documented in available sources.
